headlines.headline: Joval Brands to host investor day focused on renewable storage strategy

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on a renewable storage strategy indicates a potential future growth area, but the immediate financial impact is speculative until details are revealed.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
